samples.gvd:
module pulse_detect(
    input clk, input rst_n, input data_in,
    output reg data_out
); 
    reg [2:0] state;
    
    always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
        if(~rst_n) begin
            state <= 3'b000;
            data_out <= 1'b0;
        end
        else begin
            case(state)
                3'b000: begin
                    if(data_in == 1'b1) begin
                        state <= 3'b001;
                    end
                    else begin
                        state <= 3'b000;
                    end
                end
                3'b001: begin
                    if(data_in == 1'b0) begin
                        state <= 3'b010;
                    end
                    else begin
                        state <= 3'b001;
                    end
                end
                3'b010: begin
                    if(data_in == 1'b1) begin
                        state <= 3'b011;
                    end
                    else begin
                        state <= 3'b000;
                    end
                end
                3'b011: begin
                    if(data_in == 1'b0) begin
                        state <= 3'b100;
                    end
                    else begin
                        state <= 3'b001;
                    end
                end
                3'b100: begin
                    if(data_in == 1'b1) begin
                        state <= 3'b101;
                    end
                    else begin
                        state <= 3'b000;
                    end
                end
                3'b101: begin
                    if(data_in == 1'b0) begin
                        state <= 3'b000;
                        data_out <= 1'b1;
                    end
                    else begin
                        state <= 3'b001;
                    end
                end
                default: begin
                    state <= 3'b000;
                    data_out <= 1'b0;
                end
        endcase
    end
    
end // Auto-repaired
endmodule
samples.xml_description:
<module id="pulse_detect">
    <description>Pulse detection module. Detects rising edges of data_in and generates a pulse signal data_out.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="data_in">One-bit input signal.</input>
        <output id="data_out">Output signal indicating the presence of pulses.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>
        Always block sensitive to the positive edge of clk and the negative edge of rst_n.
        In the reset condition (~rst_n), set the state register to the initial state and set the data_out output to 0, indicating no pulse.
        Continue the detection process for the remaining states. For each state, check the value of data_in and transition to the next state accordingly.
        If the current state satisfies the last state of a "pulse", set data_out to 1, indicating the end of a pulse. Otherwise, set data_out to 0.
    </implementation>
</module>
